title: Adopt New Meeting Scheduling Tool
text: The board voted to adopt an online scheduling tool for coordinating board meetings. Decision rationale: reduce scheduling overhead and improve member participation. Vote: 5 in favor, 0 opposed, 1 abstention. Decision date: 2024-03-05 (fictional).

title: Records Retention Policy Update
text: The board approved an updated records retention policy specifying seven-year retention for meeting minutes and three-year retention for general correspondence. Decision rationale: align with standard nonprofit governance recommendations. Vote: 6 in favor, 0 opposed. Decision date: 2024-06-04 (fictional).

title: Vendor Approval Threshold
text: The board set the vendor approval threshold at $2,500 USD for routine purchases and $10,000 USD for contracts requiring board vote. Amounts are illustrative and fictional. Decision rationale: streamline routine operations while maintaining oversight for significant expenditures.
